environment.description: Override the default ~/.config base directory for qrep configuration.

post_install_notes: Create a configuration file at one of the supported paths (~/.config/qrep/qrep-config.yaml, ~/.qrep-config.yaml, or ./.qrep-config.yaml) with at minimum the github.org and github.repo keys under a top-level 'qrep' key.

Example minimal config:
  qrep:
    github:
      org: my-org
      repo: my-scripts
      branch: main
If you exceed the GitHub API rate limit, consider adding authentication support or reducing request frequency.
The default execution shell is bash; change execution.shell in the config to use a different interpreter.
uninstall_notes: Remove the man page if installed: sudo rm /usr/local/share/man/man1/qrep.1
Optionally remove system config: sudo rm -rf /etc/qrep
name: qrep
author: morgan
